channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Katerina Rawlings: Life After Divorce and Marriage to Richard Rawlings
item.description: This article profiles Katerina Rawlings, a lifestyle influencer and former spouse of business mogul Darwin Deason. She married Deason before transitioning to her current relationship with TV personali...

item.title: Linda Noskova Claims First Grand Slam Title at Wimbledon After Dramatic Final Against Karolina Muchova
item.description: Czech tennis player Linda Noskova secured her maiden Grand Slam title by overcoming Karolina Muchova in a thrilling Wimbledon final. The 21-year-old faced significant challenges, including losing five...

item.title: Pemra extends Geo News suspension, imposes fine and warns of license cancellation
item.description: The Pakistan Electronic Media Regulatory Authority (Pemra) has upheld its decision to suspend Geo News for 15 days due to the depiction of religious figures in its programming. The channel will resume...

item.title: Hawks Secure Victory Over Carlton, Ending Fraser's Winning Streak
item.description: Carlton's seven-game winning streak as interim coach Josh Fraser was ended by a 63-point defeat to Hawthorn in a deluge at the MCG. The match, played in extreme conditions, saw Hawthorn dominate the w...

item.title: Tragic Death of Bafana Star Jayden Adams Shocks South African Football Community
item.description: The South African football community is in mourning following the sudden death of 25-year-old Bafana Bafana and Mamelodi Sundowns star Jayden Adams. His body was discovered at a property in Military R...

item.title: Trump's Controversial Social Media Post Sparks Backlash in Minnesota Communities
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump faced widespread condemnation after sharing a video of Muslim kindergarteners with derogatory commentary, sparking outrage in Minnesota’s Muslim and Somali communities. The...

item.title: Tanzania Hosts Africa Agri Expo for 10th Edition
item.description: The Africa Agri Expo, a major agricultural event in Tanzania, returns for its 10th edition in September 2026. This two-day event will bring together global agribusiness leaders, investors, and innovat...

item.title: China's Tianwen-2 Probe Captures First Images of Earth's Quasi-Moon Asteroid Kamo’oalewa
item.description: China’s Tianwen-2 probe has successfully captured the first images of asteroid Kamo’oalewa, Earth’s most stable quasi-satellite, after a 400-day journey covering 1 billion kilometers. The asteroid, wh...

item.title: ADC Urges FG to Prioritize Preventing Kidnappings Over Rescue Operations
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has called on the Federal Government to shift focus from celebrating rescue operations to actively preventing kidnappings. While acknowledging the successful libe...

item.title: Robber Steals $30K in Pokémon Cards During Home Invasion
item.description: A man armed with a firearm recently robbed a Montreal residence, stealing approximately $30,000 in rare Pokémon trading cards. According to police reports, the suspect entered the home, demanded the c...

item.title: Rigathi Gachagua to Present Uhuru Report After 45-Day Political Conclave
item.description: Former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua is holding a 45-day series of meetings in Wamunyoro, Nyeri County, to discuss the political direction of the Mount Kenya region ahead of the 2027 General Elect...

item.title: Kenya Weather Forecast: Cold Spells and Rain Expected in Key Regions
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department has issued a forecast predicting cool and cloudy conditions across Nairobi and central counties for Sunday, July 12, 2026. High temperatures are expected to reach 2...

item.title: Czech Tennis Star Noskova Claims Wimbledon Women's Singles Title After Thrilling Final Against Muchova
item.description: Linda Noskova, 21, secured her first Grand Slam title by overcoming Karolina Muchova in a dramatic Wimbledon women’s singles final. The Czech player faced a nerve-wracking second set, losing five matc...

item.title: Linda Noskova Wins First Wimbledon Title After Dramatic Comeback Against Muchova
item.description: Linda Noskova, 21, has made history by winning her first Wimbledon title in a heart-stopping final against compatriot Karolina Muchova. The Czech player, seeded ninth, faced a major setback when she s...

item.title: South African Footballer Jayden Adams Dies at 25 After World Cup Participation
item.description: Jayden Adams, a 25-year-old South African footballer who played for the national team during the World Cup, has died. His death was confirmed by Gayton McKenzie, the minister of sport, arts and cultur...

item.title: Public Service Commission Addresses Civil Servants' Grievances Over Salaries and Promotions
item.description: The Public Service Commission has disclosed the main reasons behind ongoing conflicts with civil servants, highlighting tensions in Kenya's public sector. Key issues include disputes over salary incre...

item.title: Nigerians Return from South Africa Receive Government and Donor Support
item.description: Another batch of 40 Nigerians stranded in South Africa has arrived in Lagos, bringing the total number of returnees in the sixth batch to 1,174. The returnees, who came through Air Peace and Value Jet...

item.title: Elvis Presley as Best Man at Friend's 1970 Wedding
item.description: This article recounts Elvis Presley's role as the best man at the 1970 wedding of his close friend George Klein, a Memphis radio DJ. The ceremony took place in Elvis's private Imperial Suite at the In...

item.title: Tragedy strikes SA rugby as young star Luqobo Makwedini dies in France
item.description: Luqobo 'Bibo' Makwedini, a 20-year-old South African rugby prodigy, passed away in France after collapsing during a training session with AS Béziers Hérault. The incident occurred just a week after he...

item.title: Defender 110 Trophy Edition Tested in Extreme Terrain for New Off-Road Competition
item.description: The Defender 110 Trophy Edition, a special edition of the iconic vehicle, has been rigorously tested on some of the most challenging terrains globally, including Australia. This model is part of a new...
